description: Golden test pairs for Contexter RAG evaluation. Source: golden-test-doc.md (Contexter Product Overview).

pairs.query: What formats does Contexter support?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Contexter supports 15 formats: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODS, CSV, JSON, TXT, MD, HTML, PNG/JPG/WebP/SVG images, MP3/WAV/M4A/OGG audio, and MP4/MOV/WebM video.

pairs.query: How much does the Pro plan cost?
pairs.expectedAnswer: The Pro plan costs $29/month and includes 10GB storage and 1000 queries/day.

pairs.query: What is Contexter?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Contexter is a RAG-as-a-service platform that lets users upload documents in any format and creates an AI-powered knowledge base searchable via MCP protocol.

pairs.query: What is MCP protocol in Contexter?
pairs.expectedAnswer: MCP (Model Context Protocol) endpoint allows any compatible AI assistant — Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini — to connect and search your knowledge base via /sse with token-based auth.

pairs.query: What embedding model does Contexter use?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Contexter uses Jina v4 embeddings with late chunking.

pairs.query: Who founded Contexter?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Contexter was founded by Zhaslan Utegenov in 2026.

pairs.query: How does Contexter parse PDF files?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Contexter parses PDFs using Docling (IBM).

pairs.query: What database does Contexter use?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Contexter uses PostgreSQL with pgvector for hybrid search (vector + full-text).

pairs.query: How does the upload pipeline work?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Upload → parse (Docling/Whisper) → structure-aware chunking → contextual prefix → Jina v4 embedding → pgvector HNSW index.

pairs.query: What are the pricing tiers?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Starter $9/month (1GB, 100 queries/day), Pro $29/month (10GB, 1000 queries/day), Business $79/month (100GB, unlimited queries).

pairs.query: How fast was Contexter built?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Built from zero to production in 7 days.

pairs.query: What runtime does Contexter use?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Contexter is built on Bun runtime with Hono API framework.

pairs.query: How does Contexter handle audio files?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Audio files are parsed using Whisper for transcription.

pairs.query: What chunking strategy does Contexter use?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Contexter uses structure-aware splitting that preserves code blocks, tables, and lists.

pairs.query: What LLM generates answers in Contexter?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Groq Llama is used for contextual prefix generation and answer synthesis.

pairs.query: How many storage does the Starter plan include?
pairs.expectedAnswer: The Starter plan includes 1GB of storage.

pairs.query: What search method does Contexter use?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Hybrid search combining vector (pgvector HNSW) and full-text (BM25), with reranking and LLM answer generation.

pairs.query: Can ChatGPT connect to Contexter?
pairs.expectedAnswer: Yes, any compatible AI assistant including ChatGPT can connect via the MCP protocol.

pairs.query: What is the Business plan query limit?
pairs.expectedAnswer: The Business plan offers unlimited queries.

pairs.query: What is the Contexter website?
pairs.expectedAnswer: The website is https://contexter.cc, API is at https://api.contexter.cc.
